Class-Paladin — Male Forest Gnome Paladin: 20
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 20 (+5) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 18 (+4)
Background: Folk Hero Alignment: Lawful Good Deity: The Matron Of Ravens (LN)
Ability Boosts: Charisma Experience: 752610/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Small Speed: 25 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Forest Gnome Ability Adjustment: +1 Dexterity
Gnome Ability Adjustment: +2 Intelligence
Keen Mind: +1 Intelligence
Thrown Arms Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Paladin (Fighting Style); Paladin (Sacred Oath)
Feats: Fortune's Grace; Keen Mind; Lucky; Magic Initiate (Bard); Thrown Arms Master Forest Gnome Features: Darkvision; Forest Gnome Ability Adjustment; Gnome Ability Adjustment; Gnome Cunning; Language (Common; Gnomish); Natural Illusionist; Speak With Small Beasts Paladin Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Aura Of Courage; Aura Of Liberation; Aura Of Protection; Channel Divinity; Cleansing Touch; Divine Health; Divine Sense; Divine Smite; Extra Attack; Fighting Style (Defense); Fighting Style; Fury Of The Tides; Improved Divine Smite; Lay On Hands; Marine Layer; Mythic Swashbuckler; Oath Of The Open Sea Spells; Oath Of The Open Sea; Sacred Oath; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting; Stormy Waters; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Folk Hero Features: Rustic Hospitality; Skill Proficiency (Animal Handling; Survival); Tool Proficiency (Vehicles (Land); Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Sacred Oath: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Keen Mind: Always knows the direction of north and hours until sunrise or sunset/Can recall anything seen or heard during the past month
Rustic Hospitality: Can receive shelter from common folk
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +9 Performance: (cha) +4
Animal Handling: (wis) +9 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +5 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +9 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +4 Nature: (int) +5 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +5 Perception: (wis) +3 Survival: (wis) +9
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Athletics; Insight; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Carpenter's Tools; Vehicles (Land)
Languages: Common; Gnomish
Skill Notes:
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Divine Sense: R60' Can discern the location of celestials, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration until the end of the next turn 5 times per long rest
Speak With Small Beasts: Can communicate simple ideas with small animals
Combat
Hit Points: 96 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 15
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Ring Mail Shield: None Weapons: Club (+9 1d4+3 B); Greataxe (+9 1d12+3 S); Light Crossbow (+8 1d8+2 P R80/320); Unarmed Strike (+9 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Fighting Style (Defense): +1 Armor Class in armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Thrown Arms Master: +20/+40 thrown weapon range
Divine Smite: Can expend a spell slot after a successful melee attack to inflict 1d8 HP radiant plus 1d8 HP per slot level, up to a maximum of 5d8 HP; undead and fiends suffer an additional 1d8 HP
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Fortune's Grace: Can reroll an attack, ability, or saving throw, force a reroll on an attacker, or force a reroll on a save vs. a self spell, once per long rest
Fury Of The Tides: Can use a bonus action and Channel Divinity to inflict a 10' push with a successful weapon attack once per rd for 1 min; this inflicts 4 HP bludgeoning if obstructed
Improved Divine Smite: Melee attacks inflict +1d8 HP radiant
Lucky: Can gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save or inflict foe disadvantage an attack on self 3 times per long rest
Small: Has disadvantage on attacks with heavy weapons
Stormy Waters: Can use a reaction when a target moves into or out of reach to inflict 1d12 HP bludgeoning and knocked prone (save DC 18 Strength HP only)
Thrown Arms Master: Can throw any weapon; one-handed weapons have range 20/60, two-handed weapons 15/30, and light weapons return after a missed throw
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +14; Constitution: +5; Dexterity: +6; Intelligence: +9; Strength: +7; Wisdom: +13
Save Notes:
Aura Of Protection: +4 on all saves
Aura Of Courage: R30' Self and allies have immunity to frightened
Aura Of Protection: R30' Allies have +4 on all saves
Divine Health: Has immunity to disease
Gnome Cunning: Has advantage on Charisma, Intelligence, and Wisdom saves vs. magic
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: B0: 2; B: 1; P: 14 Spell Slots: P1: 4; P2: 3; P3: 3; P4: 3; P5: 2 Attack: B: +10; Forest Gnome: +11; P: +10 Spell DC: B: 18; Forest Gnome: 19; P: 18
Spells:
Augury (P2 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Divi): Reveals the weal or woe outcome of a proposed act up to 30 min in the future; additional uses before a long rest impose a cumulative 25% chance of receiving a random response [R]
Banishing Smite (P5 Abju): Next successful weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +5d10 HP force, plus banishment until the spell ends to the target's home plane or a demiplane if the attack reduces the target below 51 hit points
Blinding Smite (P3 Evoc): Next successful melee weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +3d8 HP radiant and blinded until the spell ends (save Constitution negates blindness; additional saves each rd end)
Call Lightning (P3 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Conj): R120' 5' radius inflicts 3d10 HP lightning (save Dexterity half; +1d10 HP if using a natural storm) once per turn for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Commune With Nature (P5 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Compelled Duel (P1 Ench): R30' Target stays within 30' of self (save Wisdom negates) and suffers disadvantage on attacks on others for concentration up to 1 min; self attacking another or a successful attack on the target by an ally ends
Control Water (P4 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Tran): R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Create Or Destroy Water (P1 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Tran): R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube [+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube]
Crusader's Mantle (P3 Evoc): Ally attacks within a 30' radius inflict +1d4 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min
Dancing Lights (B0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per turn as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Death Ward (P4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Detect Evil And Good (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Divine Favor (P1 Evoc): Self weapons inflict +1d4 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min
Expeditious Retreat (P1 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Find Steed (P2 Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has an Intelligence of at least 6, can understand at least 1 language, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile
Freedom Of Movement (P4 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Freedom Of The Waves (P3 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Conj): R120' 15' radius inflicts 2d8 HP bludgeoning and knocks prone (save Strength negates; 4 designated creatures automatically succeed); self can teleport within the affected area
Freedom Of The Winds (P5 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Abju): Self gains a 60' flying speed and advantage vs. grappled, restrained, and paralyzed for concentration up to 10 min; can use a reaction in response to an attack to teleport 60', ending the spell
Lesser Restoration (P2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Locate Creature (P4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; running water blocks the spell
Locate Object (P2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (B1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Magic Circle (P3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Minor Illusion (B0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Minor Illusion (Forest Gnome0 [Natural Illusionist] Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Misty Step (P2 [Oath Of The Open Sea Spells] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Raise Dead (P5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes nonmagical diseases and poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Staggering Smite (P4 Evoc): Next successful melee weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +4d6 HP psychic and disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and loss of reactions until the end of the target's next turn (save Wisdom negates disadvantage and loss of reactions)
Thunderous Smite (P1 Evoc): Next successful melee weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min inflicts +2d6 HP thunder, a 10' push, and knocked prone (save Strength negates push and prone)
Magic Notes:
Aura Of Liberation: R30' Targets cannot be grappled or restrained, can spend 5' of movement to escape from a grapple or restraint, and ignore underwater movement and attack penalties
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect once per short rest
Cleansing Touch: Touch can end a spell effect on a willing creature 4 times per long rest
Lay On Hands: Touch can heal 100 hit points per long rest; can use 5 hit points' worth to cure a disease or neutralize a poison
Magic Initiate (Bard): Knows 2 Bard cantrips and can cast a chosen B1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Marine Layer: Can use Channel Divinity to create a 20' radius fog around self that lightly obscures vision for 10 min
Mythic Swashbuckler: Can gain a 25' climb Speed, use of Dash or Disengage as a bonus action, and advantage on Dexterity checks, Dexterity saves, Athletics, and attacks vs. an adjacent foe when no other foe is adjacent, for 1 min once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the paladin spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
